OPENCTI_URL.description: The URL of the OpenCTI platform.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The default admin token set in the OpenCTI platform.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The MIME type of files this connector handles.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of the logs.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enable/disable automatic import of files matching the scope.

CONNECTOR_VALIDATE_BEFORE_IMPORT.description: If enabled, bundles are sent for validation before import.

CONNECTOR_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL.description: Default confidence level for created indicators (0-100).

YARA_IMPORT_FILE_SPLIT_RULES.description: If true, each YARA rule becomes a separate indicator. If false, all rules become one indicator.
